deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. 4/3, 2039 sqft, built 2009. CMA value $266K.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report, build analysis sheet, lock template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Listing canceled May 28. Chris walking away, signs picked up. Title defect, Isaac development interest stalled, no path forward.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development concept.
Isaac development angle: 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Isaac offered approximately $150K if mobile home development moves forward. Sisters enthusiastic.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated May 29. Clients moving back in to make updates. 3/2, 2972 sqft, pool, outdoor kitchen. Underwater by $93K-$143K. VA loan, 208 DOM.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Clients moving back in, plan to relist after updates and repairs.
Call completed. Chandler was laid off. Short sale path favored. Relationship intact, ended on good terms.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft, 2011 build. Listed May 14 at $259,900. Multiple showings, second-look buyers are hottest. June deadline, high urgency. Roof claim moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time, follow up with second-look buyers agent, monitor for backup offer

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back for second showing, their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed. Texted Jose and Katy, keeping conversation open.
MLS live, sign and lockbox dropped, neighborhood canvassed. First showing feedback received.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 4.05 acres, 3/2, 1809 sqft. Divorce situation. Payoff $257K. CMA range $275K-$315K. Thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Prior VA renovation loan purchase.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter, confirm acreage, schedule professional photos, discuss contractor opportunity

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled, listing presentation with net sheet built.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres, hunting property. Contract at $113,000 with Espinoza buyers. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received, confirm signed amendment back from Javier, verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza, agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent. EMD not yet received.
Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded Apr 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Estate sale.
deals.next: Joy gift delivery pending, thank you basket for Michael and UPS Store staff

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Transaction confirmed complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Joy signed at UPS Store. Release delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Grace Gardens Lennar home. Rental arrangement ended. Payment received ($500). Released on good terms May 29.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received from Jimbo

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo with acknowledgment of payment received. Relationship intact, closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover time and money invested.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected, flooring this week, water meter pending. Contractor Matt Toney / SA Remodelers on site.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm utility status, replace camera batteries, submit listing agreement to Jerry and Ray

logs.m: Visited property, installed 3 cameras. Electricians reconnected from pole to meter. Drywall complete, paint finishing, flooring starts this week. Water meter pending 1-2 days.
Work officially started. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: LRH pop-up source. Rental being sold, need to move faster. 916 Marriott assessed and passed. Pivoting to new construction. Pre-approval ~$122K with Zach Schaphorst. Recently evaluated 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K but decided too much. Still actively searching.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search, identify builder options, confirm pre-approval status with Zach

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal, too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought 301 W Saxet Corpus at $85K. Connected Mike and Alice with Isaac. Zach sent property info and CAD link for 203k evaluation.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Nextdoor - High Country. Paying $1700 month rent. Military retirement plus two daughters disability checks. Actively fixing credit. VA loan likely eligible, zero down. Between jobs but strong qualifying income. Motivated and proactive.
leads.next: Call today May 14 - keep it light, follow up from Apr 29 sick grandkid conversation. Connect with VA lender, qualify timeline and budget.

logs.m: Flagged to call today - has been overdue since Apr 30. VA buyer, motivated. Do not let slip again.
Spoke with Pamela today, she has sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation. Following up tomorrow.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Opportunity 1: Green Bliss rental setup (brother in law). Opportunity 2: Milagros Stringer (Brandon mom) new construction buyer in Grace Gardens area. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000 month payment.
leads.next: Confirm Wed or Thu visit to Grace Gardens with Brandon and his mom, call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 before visit to register buyer agent, get mom contact info

logs.m: Reached out to builders for options. MI Homes from Frank found option keeping payments under $1200 month. Multiple builder rate buydowns in play.
Buyer rep signed for Milagros. Rental setup docs in folder for 8527 Green Bliss.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 Priority Bank property May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor on project. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting, looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Brycee contact info on next site visit at 181 CR, qualify wife VA eligibility, connect with VA lender, send VA Buyers Guide

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Warm relationship, natural conversation.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Jerome has buyer interested in property needing work - unique situation. Caught up May 11, details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and what property they want, understand financing and work scope

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome - buyer interested in fixer property, unique situation. Details pending.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection through Little Red House. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential - trust-based, long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally, ask permission to share her story (content), keep nurturing relationship

logs.m: Community connection - grief to healing through plants story. Needs permission for content collaboration.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person Apr 18. Investor interested in Schertz area. Buy box unknown. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold), add to Bold Trail, connect on active deals if match

logs.m: Met in person - investor interested in Schertz area. No further details on file yet.

leads.title: Miss Pats Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat (neighbor) mentioned neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns the house. Deceased was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet about property status.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact info, reach out to son, assess situation (keeping, renting, or selling)

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned - neighbor passed away, son owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Community connection is the right angle.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Spoke with Chris about nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers received and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead - needs follow-up.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area (priority), set up listing timeline, follow up on 9815 Conbes offer details, determine if seller or buyer lead

logs.m: Moving forward - pull CMA and get everything together. This is priority today alongside Colton Brown prep.

priorities.title: Utilities at 181 CR 7751
priorities.notes: Electric reconnected from pole to meter. Water meter pending 1-2 days. Camera batteries need replacement on next site visit. Follow up to confirm both utilities finalized before listing.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric 866-632-3532 - confirm new meter install status
Call EMCSUD 830-709-3879 - confirm water service setup
Replace camera batteries on next site visit

priorities.title: Pamela Moore Follow-Up
priorities.notes: Call overdue since Apr 30. Military retirement + disability income. VA loan zero down. Currently paying $1700 month rent. Connect with VA lender once contact confirmed.

followUps.text: Call or text Pamela today - keep it light, check on grandkid first

priorities.title: Mill Path Second-Look Buyers
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Rescheduled showing to May 30. Confirm time, follow up with agent after pre-inspection report offered. Monitor for backup offer submissions.

followUps.text: Confirm May 30 showing time with all parties
Follow up with second-look buyers agent on pre-inspection report status
Monitor for backup offer submissions from other agent

priorities.title: Brandon & Milagros Grace Gardens Visit
priorities.notes: Brandon Moran (investor/referral source) bringing mom Milagros Stringer to Grace Gardens for new construction buyer registration. Must register Chris as her agent on first builder visit. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000 month payment. Multiple builder rate buydowns in play.

followUps.text: Text Brandon - confirm Wed or Thu visit with him and his mom
Call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 - heads up buyer coming to register
Register Chris as Milagros buyer agent on first builder visit - critical step

priorities.title: Colton Brown Listing Prep
priorities.notes: Divorce situation. 4.05 acres, thin market with only 3 comps. Payoff confirmed $257K. CMA range $275K-$315K recommended. Met May 15, ready to move forward. Need updated payoff letter, confirm acreage, professional photos, discuss contractor opportunity.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender
Confirm acreage on site - impacts pricing significantly
Schedule professional photos and prepare for listing
